sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62894" key="lhkuqofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ληκῠθοφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62894.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying an oil-flask</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.154</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
